title: satureja alpina var. pyrenaea
intro: Satureja alpina var. pyrenaea, also known as mountain savory, is a subspecies of the Satureja alpina plant, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been shown to help alleviate digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Satureja alpina var. pyrenaea include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as an antiseptic to prevent the spread of infections. Herbal preparations of Satureja alpina var. pyrenaea include teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
